item.description:
Ruby Mixer

For mixing #293430, #a0977b, #b3a8b9, and #720504:

The first hex value #293430 mixed with second hex value #a0977b makes: #827e68.

The third hex value #b3a8b9 mixed with fourth hex value #720504 makes: #822e31.

The first aggregate hex value #827e68 mixed with the second aggregate value #822e31 produces: #82423f.

Ruby Mixer

For mixing #97d700, #8a391b, #897322, and #373a36:

The first hex value #97d700 mixed with second hex value #8a391b makes: #8d6114.

The third hex value #897322 mixed with fourth hex value #373a36 makes: #4c4831.

The first aggregate hex value #8d6114 mixed with the second aggregate value #4c4831 produces: #5c4e2a.
